structured.mission: OPPO empowers everyone to create and embrace the beauty of life by cutting-edge technology, paving the way for freedom and fulfilment.
values: "Benfen" is our core value and unwavering belief, user-centricity is our rock-solid principle and a passion for creating is our continuous driving force.

analyst_note: OPPO 当前官方表述基线；当前页面以品牌叙事表达 mission 与 core value，vision 空缺。
